creator: kes-kes@yandex.ru
text:
if I comment out 'device et' or try 'nodevice et' in KERNCONF file and if_et.c contain:
#cat /usr/src/sys/dev/et/if_et.c
aldsfjadl;fadjf NO COMPILEABLE CODE HERE

I can not build kernel at all.

How-To-Repeat: comment out some device option in KERNCONF file or add 'nodevice et' for example.
and echo "tra-ta-ta" > /usr/src/sys/dev/et/if_et.c

try to build kernel
